nasb.text: so they signaled to their partners in the other boat for them to come and help them. And they came and filled both of the boats, so that they began to sink.

esv.text: They signaled to their partners in the other boat to come and help them. And they came and filled both the boats, so that they began to sink.

cnv.text: 就招呼另外那隻船上的同伴來幫助，他們就來把兩隻船裝滿，甚至船要下沉。

ccb.text: 于是招呼另一条船上的同伴来帮忙。他们一起把两条船都装满了鱼，船几乎要沉下去了。

csbs.text: 他们就招呼另一条船上的伙伴来帮忙；他们过来，装满了两条船，甚至两条船都几乎要沉下去了。
